title: Incorrect type cast in prepared statement
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

Hi, in the following test case, the value of `t0.c0` is incorrectly cast to a string in the prepared statement. In the normal query, the query result is correct.

```
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES (0);
SELECT ((INET6_ATON((t0.c0)))OR('a')) FROM t0;  -- NULL
SET @a = 'a';
PREPARE prepare_query FROM 'SELECT ((INET6_ATON((t0.c0)))OR(?)) FROM t0';
EXECUTE prepare_query USING @a; -- Incorrect string value: '0' for function inet_aton6
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
The prepared statement should not trigger an error.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
The prepared statement triggers an error.

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v9.0.0-beta.2.pre-196-g312226f869\nEdition: Community\nGit Commit Hash: 312226f869d56922135e1c177cac6c90319c3134\nGit Branch: HEAD\nUTC Build Time: 2025-09-21 08:27:14\nGoVersion: go1.23.11\nRace Enabled: false\nCheck Table Before Drop: false\nStore: unistore\nKernel Type: Classic
key_bug_features: Incorrect type cast in prepared statement execution
bug_feature_seed: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 DOUBLE, c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(10));
SELECT (INET6_ATON(CAST(t0.c0 AS DOUBLE)) OR 'a') FROM t0;
PREPARE ps1 FROM 'SELECT (INET6_ATON(t0.c0) OR (?)) FROM t0';
PREPARE ps2 FROM 'SELECT (INET6_ATON(CAST(t0.c0 AS DOUBLE)) OR (?)) FROM t0';
PREPARE ps3 FROM 'SELECT (INET6_ATON(t0.c1) OR (?)) FROM t0';
PREPARE ps4 FROM 'SELECT (INET6_ATON(?) OR t0.c0) FROM t0';
PREPARE ps5 FROM 'SELECT (INET6_ATON(t0.c0) OR (? + 0)) FROM t0';
